assessments.title: Service demand surge: 23 alerts, 2 BOSS states hit
assessments.analysis: 23 severe/extreme alerts across MO, KS, OK, LA, CA, TX. Event types: Flash Flood Warning, Red Flag Warning, Flood Warning, Flood Watch. 27 storm alerts — roofers, restoration, and plumbers will be overwhelmed within 24-48hrs. BOSS TERRITORY HIT: OK, TX — these are your states. Direct targeting opportunity.
hypotheses: ACTIONABLE: OK, TX businesses are losing calls RIGHT NOW. 24-48hr window to reach them while pain is acute.
watch_for: Storm path progression — get ahead of it, call businesses BEFORE they're overwhelmed
Reddit pain posts spiking in specific subreddits = niche confirmation
If heat wave persists >3 days, missed call rates compound (crews fatigue)
assessments.business_angle: IMMEDIATE: Target OK, TX contractors NOW

assessments.title: Intelligence gaps: 6 blind spots active
assessments.analysis: 6 sources returned no data: metaculus, acled, ioda, fred, safecast, eia. IODA (internet outage) data unavailable — cannot detect blackouts that precede political crises. These gaps reduce confidence in all other assessments that would cross-reference these sources.
hypotheses: FRED gap: No economic indicators = cannot confirm or deny recession/inflation signals from commodity moves.
watch_for: If multiple sources fail simultaneously, check if it's network-wide (your connection) vs source-specific (their API)
Prolonged GDELT outage = check alternative news APIs
ADS-B silence could mean tracking is being deliberately suppressed — itself a signal
assessments.business_angle: Military/security events create uncertainty — businesses freeze hiring and expand automation. Position BOSS as the stable, cost-cutting option.

assessments.title: Global disaster alert: 1 elevated events across 1 hazard types
assessments.analysis: GDACS elevated alerts: 1 Orange/Red events — drought(1). Affected regions: Madagascar. Cross-ref: USGS reports 2 M5.0+ quakes; GDACS tracking 17 earthquake events. Active tropical cyclones: 1. NASA FIRMS: 30 high-confidence fire detections. GDELT: 47 disaster-related articles corroborate.
hypotheses: HUMANITARIAN: 1 drought alerts — food security and displacement risk in affected regions
INFRASTRUCTURE: Active cyclones threaten shipping lanes and port operations — monitor commodity supply chains
CASCADING RISK: 2 flood events — watch for infrastructure damage, disease outbreaks, displacement
watch_for: Alert level escalation from Orange to Red on any event
Multiple disaster types converging on same region (compound disaster)
Commodity price spikes correlated with disaster-affected supply chains
Humanitarian agency surge (ReliefWeb) confirming escalation
assessments.business_angle: Natural events drive emergency service demand spikes. Contractors get overwhelmed with calls — exactly when they need BOSS most.

assessments.title: Military posture assessment: 100 aircraft, 50 conflict reports, 7 dark zones
assessments.analysis: 100 military aircraft tracked across 23 regions. GDELT: 50 conflict articles — hotspots: United States(11), China(6), Russia(5). Think tank analysis (32 items): A deeper look at Trump’s new policy toward the Western Balkans; A Budget for Global Turmoil: Peace, Conflict and the EU’s Funding Plans; After the Invasion: China Considers the Problem of Ruling Taiwan. ANOMALY: 7 regions with concentrated military air and no corresponding news coverage — the silence is the signal. Markets pricing in escalation: Israel announces Lebanon ceasefire extension by June 7? at 100.0%. Note: 23 severe weather alerts active — if military activity persists through bad wx, less likely to be routine training.
hypotheses: HYPOTHESIS A (covert positioning): 7 regions show military aircraft with zero corresponding news — unusual unless activity is deliberate and unpublicized
watch_for: Change in tanker-to-fighter ratio (more tankers = shifting from training to ops)
ISR platforms shifting to new regions = new collection target
Prediction markets moving >10 points in 24hrs on conflict questions
News coverage appearing for regions (40,-100, 30,-100, 30,-90) — would confirm something newsworthy is happening there
assessments.business_angle: Military/security events create uncertainty — businesses freeze hiring and expand automation. Position BOSS as the stable, cost-cutting option.

HYPOTHESIS B (broad): General uptick in exploit activity across multiple vectors

assessments.title: Seismic event: M5.2 at 193 km SSE of Vilyuchinsk, Russia
assessments.analysis: M5.2 at 193 km SSE of Vilyuchinsk, Russia. Total significant quakes (M5.0+): 2. Depth: 13.4km. Felt reports: None. GDACS tracking 17 earthquake events (all Green — low humanitarian impact).
hypotheses: MOST LIKELY: Natural tectonic event — location consistent with plate boundary activity
watch_for: Aftershock sequence (increasing aftershock magnitude = potential larger event coming)
Tsunami warnings issued/cancelled
Radiation readings change near nuclear facilities within 500km
News coverage appearing (or not) — prolonged silence on large quakes is itself a signal

assessments.title: Market Intelligence: 19 edges across 4 countries, top edge 14.2pp
assessments.analysis: Paper trader analyzed 366 markets, found 19 edges. Largest edge: 'US x Iran permanent peace deal by December 31, 2026?' — market 71.5% vs ATLAS 57.3% (14.2pp edge). Geopolitical hotspots by market attention: US, IR, RO, GB, IL. Negative Reddit sentiment on: peace, other, nuclear, election, conflict, maritime, humanitarian — public mood contra-bullish. Cross-platform divergence: 'Will the Fed increase interest rates by 50+ bps af' spread 8.0pp — information asymmetry signal. Iran: 1 conflict articles corroborate trader focus. Russia: 1 conflict articles corroborate trader focus. Information gaps identified: Will a team from LCK (South Korea) win M; Will New Zealand win? — ATLAS should prioritize these regions next scan.
hypotheses: HYPOTHESIS A: Markets consistently overpricing peace/diplomacy outcomes — adversarial base rates suggest NO bets have structural edge
HYPOTHESIS C: Cross-platform price divergences indicate slow information propagation — exploitable window before convergence
HYPOTHESIS D: 2 markets have zero relevant news — these are either non-events or black holes where information isn't reaching open sources
watch_for: Edge convergence: if market moves toward ATLAS position, confirms our analysis
New prediction market listings on hotspot countries — fresh liquidity = fresh edge
Breaking news from NZ, KR — fills information gaps and may move markets sharply
assessments.business_angle: Market intelligence reveals global stress patterns. Countries with high market attention = news-cycle-driven anxiety = businesses more receptive to 'protect your revenue' pitch.

top_edges.question: US x Iran permanent peace deal by December 31, 2026?
US announces new Iran agreement/ceasefire extension by July 31?
Will a team from LCK (South Korea) win MSI 2026?
Russia x Ukraine ceasefire agreement by December 31, 2026?

assessments.title: Space weather alert: 3 flare(s), Kp=6.33
assessments.analysis: 3 M/X-class flare(s) in past 7 days. Kp index reached 6.33 — moderate geomagnetic storm. Cross-ref: 100 aircraft tracked — GPS-dependent navigation could be affected.
hypotheses: HYPOTHESIS A (transient): Solar activity subsides within 48h, no lasting impact
HYPOTHESIS B (cascade): CME impact causes GPS degradation + power grid stress in high-latitude regions
watch_for: NOAA SWPC upgrade to G3+ geomagnetic storm warning
Airline reroutes away from polar corridors
Power grid operator emergency actions in Scandinavia/Canada
assessments.business_angle: Natural events drive emergency service demand spikes. Contractors get overwhelmed with calls — exactly when they need BOSS most.

assessments.title: Analyst consensus: 150 think tank pieces, top focus: ai
assessments.analysis: Think tank attention index: 150 analyses across 9 topics. Top focus: ai(33); china(12); iran(7); nuclear(7); russia(6). Dominant theme 'ai' — latest: Countering terrorist propaganda in the age of AI. Central banks publishing 3 statements simultaneously.
hypotheses: HYPOTHESIS A (crisis developing): Heavy analyst attention on 'ai' indicates building crisis that mainstream news hasn't caught yet
HYPOTHESIS B (reaction): Analysts responding to events already in progress — this is assessment, not prediction
watch_for: Shift in think tank attention AWAY from ai to new topic = new crisis emerging
Multiple think tanks publishing simultaneously on same topic = coordinated concern
Official feeds (Fed/ECB/UN) echoing think tank themes = institutional confirmation
assessments.business_angle: Geopolitical shifts affect trade, supply chains, and business confidence. Monitor for ripple effects reaching US small business sector.

assessments.title: AI/Tech landscape: 22 signals
assessments.analysis: 22 AI signals across HN/RSS/Reddit. Topics: How LLMs work; S&P 500 rejects SpaceX, also blocking entry for OpenAI and A; Mbodi AI (YC P25) Is Hiring Founding Machine Learning Engine. Reddit AI sentiment: 2 posts about AI in small business.
hypotheses: Market signal: 22 mentions suggests elevated attention — possible capability release or regulatory news
watch_for: Competitor pricing changes (especially if they lower to match BOSS)
New AI voice agent announcements — potential threats or partnership targets
Small business AI adoption stories in Reddit = market validation
assessments.business_angle: New AI tools = new automation possibilities for BOSS clients

hypotheses: HYPOTHESIS A (escalation): New sanctions rounds signal diplomatic deterioration — follow with trade restrictions
HYPOTHESIS B (status quo): Existing sanctions maintained, no new designations = stable geopolitical environment
watch_for: New OFAC SDN additions in energy/defense sectors
EU-US sanctions divergence on any country = policy split
Sanctions evasion reports in GDELT or think tank feeds

assessments.title: Corporate Activity Cluster: 10 insider trades, 15 material events
assessments.analysis: SEC EDGAR shows 10 insider trades and 15 material event filings.
hypotheses: Insider selling precedes earnings miss or guidance cut — common pattern before corrections
8-K cluster indicates M&A wave — consolidation creates displaced customers needing new vendors
Routine quarterly filing activity with no directional signal — noise, not signal
watch_for: Insider sells in AI/SaaS companies — direct BOSS competitor intelligence
8-K 'going concern' filings — business failures create orphaned customers
Earnings misses following insider sells — confirms the pattern
assessments.business_angle: Track AI/tech company 8-K filings for competitor shutdowns or pivots. Their displaced customers become BOSS prospects.

anomalies.description: 15 military aircraft near (40,-100) with minimal news coverage
anomalies.assessment:
NO MILITARY BASE within 300km — activity is in open area, increasing anomaly significance.

BOTTOM LINE: Military activity detected without clear operational context. May indicate exercise, transit, or developing situation.

INFORMATION GAP: Zero news articles covering this area. This could mean: (1) classified exercise, (2) routine activity not considered newsworthy, (3) developing situation not yet reported, or (4) deliberate information suppression.
